name: tsswitch
description: Restart the VS Code TypeScript server from the status bar.

tsSwitch.autoRecovery.description: Automatically recover TypeScript by restarting the TS server after config changes, error spikes, or an unresponsive TS server.

tsSwitch.reloadWindowAfterRestart.description: Reload the VS Code window after the integrated restart and project reload flow.

scripts.test: npm run compile && node ./dist/test/suite/statusLabels.test.js && node ./dist/test/suite/statusBarController.test.js && node ./dist/test/suite/autoRecoverySettings.test.js && node ./dist/test/suite/restartSettings.test.js && node ./dist/test/suite/outputLogger.test.js && node ./dist/test/suite/historyTracker.test.js && node ./dist/test/suite/logMessages.test.js && node ./dist/test/suite/packageManifest.test.js && node ./dist/test/suite/extensionMenu.test.js
